author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Fleet Rentals Launch Date  

Pack more heat. Rent your fleet.

Fleet Rentals are officially coming March 5!  
 For Owners - Put your fleets to work and use this feature to earn passive ATLAS
 For Renters - Access larger ships, fill gaps in your fleet, or boost your guild’s firepower. The possibilities are endless.

 | If you're interested in Fleet Rentals, we highly recommend your read this detailed article: https://medium.com/star-atlas/introducing-fleet-rentals-in-star-atlas-play-and-earn-your-way-179852b3c99a
